description: MOVE inside ON SIZE ERROR handler — 999*999=998001 overflows PIC 9(4)
notes: COMPUTE WS-R = 999 * 999 = 998001, which exceeds PIC 9(4) max of 9999. ON SIZE ERROR fires, MOVE 'Y' TO WS-FLAG executes. WS-R stays at initial value 0 (not stored on overflow). Tests MOVE as handler inside ON SIZE ERROR clause.
